name: tapagents
description: TapAgents marketplace — opinionated AI product team for Claude Code. One curated plugin, not a sprawl of forty.

plugins.name: tapagents
plugins.description: The full TapAgents framework — 18 agents, 20 commands, 32 protocols, stack-aware templates, fifteen instrumented enforcement + telemetry hooks (every hook fire / block / classification / misfire lands in events.jsonl; M0 adds redacted permission-denial / harness-block telemetry; v0.15.0 adds auto-registration of cross-cutting sessions; v0.21.0 adds the sync-discipline gate that enforces framework adoptions through the dedicated `sync-tapagents` branch; v0.22.0 shifts HQ topology to filesystem-only sync (no git tree at the source root) and adds the manifest `lint_exemptions` block + `--source-mode` flag for sync.ts), and an internal→public sync flow keeping the framework's two trees in lockstep. Installs a complete AI product team in your repo.
